security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data: blob:; font-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://github.com https://*.githubusercontent.com; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'
security.devCsp: default-src 'self' http://localhost:1420; script-src 'self' http://localhost:1420 'wasm-unsafe-eval' 'unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' http://localhost:1420 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost http://localhost:1420 data: blob:; font-src 'self' http://localhost:1420 data:; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://localhost:1420 ws://localhost:1420; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'

bundle.shortDescription: A VS Code-inspired Git GUI built with Tauri, Rust, and React.
bundle.longDescription: GitPulse is a cross-platform desktop Git client with source control, diffing, branch management, commit graph, blame, file history, stashes, worktrees, and remote sync.
